category_sources: Official ROOT Cling page describes Cling as an interactive C++ interpreter built on LLVM and Clang.
display_name_sources: Official ROOT page and GitHub README use the name Cling.
docs_sources: Official ROOT Cling page provides command-line and resource documentation.
Official ROOT manual has a dedicated Cling chapter.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/root-project/cling, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README topics include c-plus-plus, interpreter, llvm, and clang.
Official ROOT Cling page describes a command-line interactive C++ interpreter built on LLVM and Clang.
